system.flavor: You strike down their strongest and best, driving them to their inevitable end.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
Finishing Blow [X]: Release a burst (1) self area effect, pushing all foes inside 1. If your foe is in crisis, push +1d3.
Effect your attack defeats your foe, all foes in the area become dazed.
